title: HG Kitchen Drain & Plug Unblocker, Natural, Heavy Duty, Kitchen Sink Unblocker & Cleaner for Pipes, Septic Tank Safe - 1 Litre
features: HG Drain Unblocker for kitchen sinks: A fast acting drain unblocker and kitchen sink cleaner. Clears the pipes quickly and easily; ideal for persistent blockages caused by fat, oil and food remnants
Eco conscious formula: The kitchen sink unblocker is made using natural ingredients, including enzymes and microbes, making this cleaner biodegradable and safe for any kitchen drain or septic tank
Quick and easy plughole unblocker: High strength blockage remover gel which gets to work eating away at the blockage. Try this first before calling a plumber! Gentle on sinks, pipes and traps
Easy to use drain cleaner fluid: Can also be used as a sink drain cleaner and de-odouriser. Enhances the bacteria culture of septic tanks and has a preventative effect to help avoid future blockages

Includes: 1 x HG Plughole Unblocker, 1L. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, with HG Mould Remover, toilet unblocker, shower drain unblocker and all surface cleaner
description: From the manufacturer A blocked or smelly drain, now that's annoying. Luckily there are a number of very effective HG solutions to help you solve this problem! HG kitchen drain and plug unblocker This kitchen drain unblocker makes quick work of persistent blockages in the sink. Sinks and basins can become blocked from food remnants, fat and oils which are washed down the drain when washing dishes. This powerful unblocker liquid works from natural enzymes and microbes that eat through the blockage leaving your drains clean. HG duo unblocker HG duo unblocker is for unblocking serious kitchen drain blockages caused by leftover food remnants and fats washed away when cleaning dishes. This effective drain unblocker uses a unique 2 component formula that is ready to use and safe for all drains - ideal for removing the most persistent blocked kitchen drains. HG drain odour remover This drain odour eliminator removes any dirt that causes bad smells in drains, leaving your sink or drain smelling fresh and clean. Cleans and deodorizes for 10 treatments from smelly drains, shower wastes and sinks. How to Use the HG Kitchen Drain Unblockers and Odour Remover HG kitchen drain and plug unblocker Allow some lukewarm water to run into the blocked sink before treatment. Pour 300ml of the product into the drain of the blocked sink. Pour the same amount of lukewarm water into the drain in order to activate the enzymes and microbes in the unblocker. Leave the product to work for 6 to 8 hours before running water down the drain again. HG duo unblocker Remove as much sitting water from the affected area. Carefully pour 2 measures of the drain unblocked from bottle A and pour down the drain. Carefully pour 1 measure of the drain unblocked from bottle B and pour down the drain. Leave the product to work for a minium of 1 hour. We recommend leaving over night for persistent blockages. Rinse with plenty of water and carefully pour the remainder of the contents from bottle A and then bottle B down the drain to achieve an optimum post-treatment. HG drain odour remover Rinse the drain first with hot water. Add 50gr (5 caps) of HG drain odour remover granules directly into the drain. Leave the drain deodorizer to work for 30 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with hot water. *If you spill any drain odour eliminator, remove it immediately with water. If the dishwasher is connected to the kitchen drain, we recommend not using this product during or before using the dishwasher as the dishwasher water can rinse the deodorizer granules away before it has had enough time to take effect.
